Note: Make sure you have a ranged weapon like a bow or crossbow (including arrows or bolts) for killing the chariot.
Optional: Talk to Varre now that Godrick is dead.
Travel to Roundtable Hold and exhaust Enia's dialogue in the newly opened room.
Touch the Two Fingers to learn the Rapture gesture.
On the balcony opposite Enia's room sits Rogier:
Tell him that you've defeated Godrick to receive Rogier's Rapier+8.
Note: You can remove the ash of war from his weapon to obtain Ash of War: Glintblade Phalanx.
Talk to him about the corpse under Stormveil to unlock dialogue about the black knifeprints with Fia.
Talk to him about D and he'll additionally drop Rogier's Letter when he dies, detailing the location of D, Hunter of the Dead's brother.
MISSABLE: In the hall below the balcony, you'll be invaded by Mad Tongue Alberich. Let him finish his gesture to learn the Reverential Bow gesture, then kill him for Taunter's Tongue.
Head through the open door that leads to a corpse on a bed with the Cipher Pata.
Optional: Talk to Hewg and he'll comment that you've felled your mark. Reload the area, then talk to him about his prayer.
MISSABLE: Let Fia hold you, then select "Do you know…?" and "About the Black Knifeprint" to receive the Knifeprint Clue.
Optional: Talk to D, Hunter of the Dead about Rogier.
Exhaust Nepheli's dialogue in the library. If you talked to her in Stormveil Castle, you'll receive the (missable) Arsenal Charm.
Optional: Exhaust Gideon Ofnir's dialogue, then talk to him about Nepheli.
Travel to the Church of Pilgrimage and grab the Warhawk Ashes on the cliff edge behind the church (painting reward).
Descend the pillar behind the church to find Bewitching Branch x3 and Sliver of Meat on a ledge below the cliff.
Travel to Seaside Ruins and jump down the spiritspring below the cliff south-southwest of the grace. Kill the Alabaster Lord on the beach for Ash of War: Gravitas.
Past the fallen pillar on the beach lies a corpse with Lump of Flesh x3.
Enter the cave on the beach to find the Haligdrake Talisman hanging off a ledge.
Requires 2 Stonesword Keys: Drop down, head up the stairs, and unlock the imp seal from the start of the game to enter Fringefolk Hero's Grave:
Descend the ladder and run past the poison. Wait for the chariot to appear, then pick up the Poisonbone Dart x5.

Make your way down the tomb until you reach a thin bridge with an item on it. Drop to the first ledge below the bridge, use Margit's Shackle to deactivate the fire-breathing pillar, and enter the north-northwest room for Lightning Grease x2.
Pick up the Erdtree's Favor past the bridge in the other room, then immediately run back across and drop to a ledge below the start of the bridge.
After dropping down, take the lift up to a ledge with a Stonesword Key and a Banished Knight.

Equip a bow or crossbow, then once the chariot slams into the wall below and the screen starts shaking, shoot one of the ceiling ropes to drop a giant pot onto it, destroying the chariot and earning you the Erdtree Greatbow and Great Arrow x10.
Note: You can respawn the pots by resting at the grace.
With the chariot dead, drop down and pick up the Golden Rune [5] on the thin bridge.
Follow the uphill path to a spectral Banished Knight. Kill him for the Dragon Communion Seal, then loot the Dragonwound Grease on the corpse.
Head all the way down while picking up the Grave Glovewort [1] along the way.
Kill the Ulcerated Tree Spirit for a Golden Seed, Banished Knight Oleg, and 15,000 runes.
MISSABLE: Travel to The First Step and read the glowing message at Varre's location to learn the Bravo! gesture.
